Unlimited Car Wash Access

Book washes instantly, check in with QR codes, and enjoy member-only pricing across Mombasa.

  • Book in 3 taps — Select service, date, and pay via M-Pesa
  • QR Wash Pass — Instant QR code delivered after booking
  • Member pricing — No per-booking app fee on subscription
  • Trusted partners — Verified wash points across Mombasa

Get started →  |  Sign in

30-day free trial · No credit card needed
